name: dimly lit Elevator Shaft
description: I'm in a dimly lit Elevator Shaft
hints: Elevator shaft level 2. Check niches for items.
LOOK NICHE finds hidden items. Multiple exits available.
LOOK NICHE finds items. WEST to waiting room (room 10). UP to level 3 (room 11). DOWN to level 1 (room 6).
notes: Shaft level 2. LOOK NICHE finds items. W to room 10, U to room 11, D to room 6.
